rulings.Case Title: AS YOU SOW VS ADG CONCERNS INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Pltf'S Amendment To Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Its Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Amendment To Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A In Support Of Moti
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CLAIM HAD NOT ACCURED AGAINST DEFENDANT AT TIME OF FILING OF ORIGINAL COMPLAINT - NO CLAIM UNTIL 60 DAYS AFTER NOTICE. SUPPLEMENTAL COMPLAINT CANNOT BE USED FOR NEW CAUSE OF ACTION OR DEFENSE SEE FLOOD VS. SIMPSON 45CAL.APP.3D 644. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENE JUN TOM et al VS. NORMA MADUGAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO QUASH DENIED. ALLEGATION OF COMPLIANCE WITH GOVERNMENT CODE 7060 AND SF RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION ORDINANCE CONTAINED IN PARAGRAPH 10 SUFFICIENT SEE GARCIA LANDLORD TENANT PARAGRAPH 8:52, ALSO SEE COURT APPROVED FORM UD COMPLAINT PARAGRAPH 13, ALTERNATIVELY PROOF OF SERVICE ON TENANT OF RENT BOARD FILED STAMPED NOTICE IS SUFFICIENT TO DEFEAT DELTA MOTION TO QUASH. (JH)
